name: Best Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Generously grease and flour a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan, or spray with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Stir together eggs, oil, salt, baking powder, vanilla, sugar, flour, baking soda, and cinnamon in a large bowl until well combined. The batter will be very thick.
4. Add the grated zucchini and chopped walnuts (or pecans) to the mixture and fold them in gently.
5. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 1-1/4 hours or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for about 10 minutes before turning off the heat and transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
8. Serve at room temperature, sliced and served with a dusting of powdered sugar if desired.
